title: Repository Structure — Schema Index
description: Pointer to the four canonical schemas that define the usebrick.dev Repository Structure Platform. Every tool in the platform — slopbrick, stackpick, gir, the MCP server, future CI integrations — reads and writes data matching these schemas.

health.description: Repository health snapshot from a single scan. v5 (v0.21.0): four orthogonal scores — aiSlopScore (now RAW amount: 0=clean, 100=saturated, higher=worse; flipped from v0.20.1 inversion), engineeringHygiene, security, repositoryHealth (each 0-100, higher is better, with composite inverting aiSlopScore at the call site) — plus issue counts. Legacy slopIndex/categoryScores kept optional for backward compat with v0.14–0.20.1 readers. The v0.20.1 aiQuality alias is REMOVED in v5 (semantics now differ: old aiQuality: 70 = 70 cleaner, new aiSlopScore: 70 = 70% slop).

structure.description: Structured JSON projection of inventory + constitution; structure.md is a derived Markdown rendering.

calibration-corpus-manifest.description: Immutable repository/file provenance manifest for the SlopBrick v10.3 calibration protocol. Consumers must validate this schema and run the versioned semantic verifier before selection or calibration. It is corpus metadata, not a release verdict.

calibration-run-manifest.description: Portable, hash-pinned SlopBrick v10.3 calibration run record. It forbids checkout paths; those remain in the separate local checkout map.

calibration-checkout-map.description: Local-only mapping from pinned repository revisions to checkout paths. Its hash, not its paths, is recorded in canonical run artifacts.

calibration-observation.description: One terminal v10.3 calibration observation per selected file.

calibration-coverage.description: v10.3 overall and language/polarity coverage accounting.
